overall.description: A static first-person perspective inside a luxurious futuristic apartment from Cyberpunk 2077, overlooking a rainy neon-lit Night City at night. The scene features a television cycling through corporate advertisements before transitioning to a holographic entertainment figure, showcasing the game's atmospheric lighting and cyberpunk aesthetic.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic apartment bedroom with entertainment screen

events.description: television screen switches to bright yellow All Foods corporate advertisement
television displays REAL MAN'S SMELL text before transitioning

agents.ego_description: standing still in the apartment, watching the television advertisements cycle

entered.detail: unmade bed with white linens and a book resting on top
large panoramic windows showing rainy Night City with neon lights and flying vehicles
large flatscreen display showing various corporate advertisements
curved ceiling with horizontal wooden slats and recessed lighting

segments.scene_description: The camera holds a static view of a cyberpunk apartment bedroom at night. A bed with white sheets occupies the foreground while large windows reveal a rainy neon-lit cityscape. The television on the right cycles through various advertisements including All Foods branding, casting colored light across the dark room.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic apartment bedroom with holographic entertainment display

events.description: holographic figure materializes in front of the television and begins dancing

agents.ego_description: continuing to watch the entertainment display as the holographic figure performs

notable_agents.action: holographic figure dancing and performing animated movements in front of the television

entered.detail: three-dimensional holographic figure glowing with cyan and pink light, projected in front of the television screen

segments.scene_description: The scene continues in the same apartment bedroom, but the television content has been replaced by a vibrant holographic figure dancing in the right portion of the frame. The hologram cycles through various poses and animations while the rainy cityscape remains visible through the windows behind. The room's lighting shifts slightly with the changing colors of the holographic display.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static first-person perspective within a futuristic bedroom as the room's ambient lighting transforms from corporate advertising hues to the vibrant glow of a holographic performance. It begins with a view of a bed with white sheets in the foreground, while large windows reveal a rainy, neon-lit cityscape and a television cycles through All Foods advertisements. As the screen content shifts, the corporate ads are replaced by a vibrant holographic figure dancing in the right portion of the frame. The scene then evolves as the hologram cycles through various poses and animations, causing the room's lighting to shift in synchronization with the changing colors of the display. The rainy cityscape remains a constant backdrop through the windows as the interior atmosphere becomes increasingly dynamic.
